name: Stir-Fried Celery
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the stalks of the celery from the center and cut with a sharp knife.
2. String the tougher outside stalks.
3. Cut the celery into 1-inch lengths.
4. Heat a wok or large saute pan until hot.
5. Add the oil, salt, and garlic and stir-fry for 20 seconds.
6. Pour in the celery and continue to stir-fry for 2 minutes.
7. Finally, pour in the chicken stock and continue to cook until most of the liquid has evaporated.
8. Serve immediately. Serves 4 as part of a Chinese meal or 2 as a single dish.
